title: React Shopping Cart Dashboard
description: A React application representing a dynamic shopping cart. The code contains issues with state updates, item totals, component rendering warnings, and promotional codes.

tasks.title: Fix Quantity Updates (Boundary Check)
tasks.description: Ensure that the item quantity in the cart cannot go below 1, and that decrementing the quantity properly updates the state without removing items unless explicitly removed.

tasks.title: Fix Cart Total and Subtotal Logic
tasks.description: The cart total calculations fail to correctly apply tax (8%) or subtotal accumulation when items change. Fix the calculation inside the useMemo block.

tasks.title: Fix List Unique Key Warnings
tasks.description: Fix the console errors warning about missing unique keys when rendering the list of cart items in the dashboard.

tasks.title: Implement Promo Code logic
tasks.description: Implement the promo code verification system. When a user applies 'BEE10', apply a 10% discount to the subtotal before tax is calculated. If an invalid code is input, show a 'Promo code invalid' error.
